## Event Details

**Event Name:**
**Date/Time:**
**Location:** (venue, room, address)
**Speaker(s):**
**Capacity:**

## Campaign Emails Needed

- [ ] Invite email (to prospect list)
- [ ] Confirmation email (to signups)
- [ ] Reminder email — day before
- [ ] Post-event follow-up email

## Salesforce Setup

**Lead Source for signups:**
**Campaign Name:**
**Attendance tracking:** Booked → Confirmed → Attended → Followed Up After

## Assets Needed

- [ ] Hero image for emails
- [ ] Landing page
- [ ] Registration form connected to Salesforce
- [ ] Parking permit or venue map (if applicable)
- [ ] Post-event survey

## Checklist
- [ ] All emails built, tested, and approved
- [ ] Landing page live
- [ ] Salesforce campaign created
- [ ] Invite batch sent
- [ ] Confirmation batch sent
- [ ] Reminder scheduled
- [ ] Check-in process ready
- [ ] Follow-up scheduled
